name: mm_dense_ffn_down_decode
goal: Optimize solution.py against SGLang's cuBLAS BF16 GEMM baseline for MiniMax-M3 Dense FFN Down (layers 0-2) decode; beat the full sweep and match SGLang output within the declared tolerance.

baseline.measure: reference.py timed by the harness CUPTI runtime (median device-kernel us)
